name: OpenCode
philosophy: A terminal-native marketing system rendered entirely in Berkeley Mono — every word on the page, from the hero headline down to the footer fine print, is monospaced.
trademark_signals: 100% Berkeley Mono typography across every text role — no sans-serif fallback anywhere in the chrome
Warm cream (#fdfcfc) as the only body background — no surface alternation across sections
Single dark surface (#201d1d) reserved exclusively for the hero TUI mockup
4px radius on every interactive element; sections themselves are sharp rectangles bordered in 1px hairline
ASCII bracket markers ([+], [-], [x]) used as bullet glyphs in feature lists and FAQ rows
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce a sans-serif body font, a display face, or an italic style. Berkeley Mono carries everything
Don't add drop shadows, gradients, or atmospheric backgrounds. The system is flat-on-cream
Don't replace the ASCII bracket markers with SVG icons. The brackets are the icons
